channel.title: xai_rss security feed
channel.description: Urgent security posts collected from trusted X accounts.

item.title: CareCloud EHR platform breach exposes patient data
item.description: summary: Healthcare SaaS CareCloud confirms 8-hour unauthorized access to one EHR environment on March 16; multi-tenant impact under investigation. canonical_author: @adityambasymbi source_classification: trusted_expert source_confidence: 85 source_reason: Certified expert with domain experience providing substantive incident analysis beyond basic reporting. urgency_reason: Confirmed breach in healthcare data aggregator potentially affecting multiple practices' patient records. vendors: CareCloud products: EHR, Electronic Health Records related_sources: - https://x.com/adityambasymbi/status/2038889489410527615

item.title: Cuties AI platform suffers major data breach
item.description: summary: NSFW AI companion Cuties AI breached; 144k email addresses, prompts for AI adult images, and content URLs exposed publicly last week. 26% emails previously pwned. canonical_author: @haveibeenpwned source_classification: trusted_expert source_confidence: 100 source_reason: Have I Been Pwned run by Troy Hunt, globally trusted for accurate breach notifications and analysis. urgency_reason: Newly disclosed breach of sensitive user data from authoritative breach tracking service. vendors: Cuties AI products: Cuties AI related_sources: - https://x.com/haveibeenpwned/status/2038874122609115427

item.title: FortiClientEMS CVE-2026-21643 SQLi under active exploitation
item.description: summary: CVSS 9.8 SQL injection in FortiClient EMS 7.4.4 actively exploited; upgrade to 7.4.5 recommended; detection script shared. canonical_author: @rxerium source_classification: trusted_expert source_confidence: 90 source_reason: Recognized researcher with relevant credentials and history of sharing actionable vuln intel including detection tools. urgency_reason: Active in-the-wild exploitation of critical SQLi with technical details and mitigation provided. cve_ids: CVE-2026-21643 vendors: Fortinet products: FortiClient EMS related_sources: - https://x.com/rxerium/status/2038695719284936825

item.title: CISA adds Citrix NetScaler CVE-2026-3055 to KEV Catalog
item.description: summary: Out-of-bounds read vulnerability in Citrix NetScaler added to Known Exploited Vulnerabilities; federal patch required. canonical_author: @cisacyber source_classification: official source_confidence: 100 source_reason: Government agency directly responsible for tracking and mandating patches for exploited vulnerabilities. urgency_reason: KEV inclusion confirms active exploitation requiring immediate patching by U.S. federal agencies. cve_ids: CVE-2026-3055 vendors: Citrix products: NetScaler related_sources: - https://x.com/cisacyber/status/2038695563709866279
